title: Start Page - Latest Car Additions
user_story:
As a visitor\
I want to see a prominent list on the start page which shows the cars that were recently added to the database\
So I can quickly find out about new (or old) cars I might not know yet

As a More Cars stakeholder\
I want to show the visitors a list with all the cars that were recently added\
So I can give them an incentive to come back regularly
description:
* a list with the newest `Car Model Variants` is displayed
  * the `created_at` property is used to determine the candidates
  * the list is displayed between the intro text and the node type sections
  * to save vertical space, the list is displayed as a horizontal slider
* the list is capped at 20 entries
* the items in the slider are lightweight
  * they are presented with a thumbnail and the vehicle’s name
  * no primary information or other data is shown
* all list items link to their resp. `Car Model Variant` detail page
